name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvTypExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT PROV_TYP_CD, PROV_TYP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_TYP_D WHERE PROV_TYP_SK NOT IN (0,1)) SELECT cte.PROV_TYP_CD AS PROV_TYP_CD, cte.PROV_TYP_NM AS PROV_TYP_NM, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.LastUpdtDt}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte
